title: Norwegian Kale Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful side dish that combines the earthiness of Norwegian kale with the comfort of a soft pilaf.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, melt the soft butter over medium heat.
2. Add the sauteed garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the chopped kale and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
4. In a separate pot, prepare the pilaf mix according to package instructions.
5. Combine the cooked kale and pilaf in a large serving dish.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
